descriptionShort: Dave Tomlinson recalled from St. John's Leafs AHL team to Toronto Maple Leafs lineup against San Jose.
descriptionLong: Dave Tomlinson, leading scorer for the St. John's Leafs in the AHL, has been recalled by the Toronto Maple Leafs and will play against the San Jose Sharks at Maple Leaf Gardens. The 24-year-old centre has 51 points in 37 games this season. He will likely replace Peter Zezel, who suffered a wrist sprain. The Leafs also have injuries to Doug Gilmour and Todd Gill.

attribution.headline: Dave Tomlinson gets the call as Leafs reload for Sharks
